response.justification: Bogdan has strong backend and distributed-systems experience, including real-time systems and microservices, which aligns well with the technical depth required. However, his resume lacks explicit evidence of multi-agent AI system production experience, fintech-specific domain knowledge (e.g., credit risk, real-time trade decisioning), or leadership in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people. His recent roles also do not demonstrate direct experience with regulated financial environments or hybrid engineering governance, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed-systems expertise with event-driven architectures and real-time systems
Demonstrated ability to work across full stack and multiple languages, enabling rapid prototyping and tooling development
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP, agentic workflows) at Naver, showing relevant technical alignment
concerns: No clear evidence of production multi-agent AI systems in commercial, high-stakes contexts (e.g., fintech or algorithmic trading)
Limited fintech-domain experience (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, or real-time trade decisioning)
No documented experience scaling engineering teams to 30+ people or leading hybrid engineering models with external partners

key_factors.factor: Engineering leadership at scale (30+ team size)
